summary: Mobile PWA Phase 7-8 testing completed successfully. Mobile Settings page and Mobile History page are fully functional. All modals open correctly with slide-up animation. Desktop versions continue to work on large screens.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps with navigation items - may cause click interception issues (inherited from previous phases)

passed_tests: Mobile Settings page shows user header card with avatar, name, email
Mobile Settings page shows KYC badge (Подтверждено/Verified for verified users)
Mobile Settings page shows Account section (АККАУНТ)
Mobile Settings page shows Settings section (НАСТРОЙКИ)
Mobile Settings page shows Support section (ПОДДЕРЖКА)
Mobile Settings page Account section has Personal Info (Личные данные) item
Mobile Settings page Account section has Phone (Телефон) item with checkmark for verified
Mobile Settings page Account section has KYC Verification (Верификация KYC) item with checkmark for verified
Mobile Settings page Settings section has Language & Currency (Язык и валюта) item
Mobile Settings page Support section has Help (Помощь) item
Mobile Settings page clicking Personal Info opens full-screen modal with slide-up animation
Mobile Settings page Personal Info modal shows avatar, name input, email (disabled), account number (disabled), save button
Mobile Settings page clicking Phone opens full-screen modal
Mobile Settings page Phone modal shows info box, phone input, send code button
Mobile Settings page clicking KYC Verification opens full-screen modal
Mobile Settings page KYC modal shows verified status for verified users
Mobile Settings page KYC modal shows document upload sections for unverified users
Mobile Settings page clicking Language & Currency opens full-screen modal
Mobile Settings page Language modal shows language options (Русский, Қазақша, English)
Mobile Settings page Language modal shows currency options (USD, KZT, EUR, USDT)
Mobile Settings page language/currency selection works (checkmark shows selected)
Mobile Settings page logout button (Выйти из аккаунта) is visible
Mobile Settings page logout button works - redirects to login page
Mobile History page shows tabs: Operations (Операции) and Contracts (Контракты)
Mobile History page Operations tab shows transactions grouped by date
Mobile History page transactions show Calendar icon with date header
Mobile History page transactions show type (Инвестиция, Доход), amount, status
Mobile History page income transactions show green amount with + prefix
Mobile History page expense transactions show regular amount with - prefix
Mobile History page filter button shows filter options when clicked
Mobile History page filter options: All (Все), Income (Доходы), Expenses (Расходы), Profit (Прибыль)
Mobile History page Contracts tab shows contract cards
Mobile History page contract cards show ID, portfolio, status badge
Mobile History page contract cards show amount (Сумма) and profit (Прибыль)
Mobile History page contract cards show progress bar for active investments
Mobile History page contract cards show date range with Calendar icons
Mobile History page contract cards show Download Contract (Скачать контракт) button
Desktop Settings page works on large screens (1920x1080)
Desktop Settings page shows tabs: Profile (Профиль), Settings (Настройки), KYC
Desktop History page works on large screens (1920x1080)
Desktop History page shows tabs: Transaction History (История операций), Investment Contracts (Инвестиционные контракты)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Duplicate CSS animation definitions for .animate-slide-up and @keyframes slideUp in index.css were causing modal animation issues. Removed duplicate definitions to use App.css version.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA Phase 7-8 implementation verified. MobileSettings.js uses full-screen modal pattern with animate-slide-up class. Modals are rendered inside PullToRefresh component. IMPORTANT: When testing mobile views, there are 2 instances of each component (one in hidden desktop layout, one in visible mobile layout). Always target the visible instance by checking parent display property. MobileHistory.js uses tabs for transactions/contracts. Transactions grouped by date with Calendar icon headers. Filter pills allow filtering by type. Contract cards show progress bars for active investments. Desktop versions use SettingsPage.js and HistoryPage.js with useIsMobile() hook to switch between mobile and desktop components.

css_fix_applied.issue: Duplicate @keyframes slideUp and .animate-slide-up definitions causing modal animation to not complete
css_fix_applied.fix: Removed duplicate definitions from index.css, keeping only App.css version
